description: Sprint 2026-04-05: B-033 Legacy Profile Threshold Cleanup — 5 stories from Spool's code audit (2026-04-12). Corrects stale/wrong values in the legacy profile threshold system that never got updated when tiered thresholds were added.

userStories.title: Fix Legacy Profile Coolant Critical Threshold
userStories.description: The legacy profile threshold system has coolantTempCritical=110 (or 115 in performance profile) in 6 locations. 110F is cold-engine territory and would fire constantly. Spool's tiered system has 220F as the correct danger threshold. This story updates all 6 legacy locations to match.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/alert/thresholds.py:139: coolantTempCritical from 110 to 220
Update src/alert/manager.py:72: coolantTempCritical from 110 to 220
Update src/profile/types.py:45: coolantTempCritical from 110 to 220
Update src/obd_config.json:108 (daily profile): coolantTempCritical from 110 to 220
Update src/obd_config.json:119 (performance profile): coolantTempCritical from 115 to 220
Update src/obd/obd_config_loader.py:350: coolantTempCritical from 110 to 220
Update src/obd/config/loader.py:350: coolantTempCritical from 110 to 220
Add explicit unit specification (fahrenheit) to profile threshold schema if feasible
Update any tests asserting the old values (grep for 110 and 115 near coolant context)
Full test suite passes (pytest tests/)
Config JSON validates (python validate_config.py or python -m json.tool src/obd_config.json)
Update offices/pm/backlog/B-033.md US-140 acceptance criteria checkboxes
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-04-12. All 7 source locations updated (110→220, 115→220). Added thresholdUnits metadata to profiles section in obd_config.json. 10 test files updated. 1517 tests pass, config validates.

userStories.title: Complete RPM Hotfix in Legacy Profile System
userStories.description: US-139 updated tieredThresholds.rpm.dangerMin from 7200 to 7000 but did not touch the legacy profile system. Performance profile still has rpmRedline=7200. This story completes what US-139 started.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/obd_config.json:118: performance profile rpmRedline from 7200 to 7000
Search for any other occurrences of rpmRedline=7200 in src/ and update
Update any test fixtures or assertions referencing performance profile rpmRedline=7200
Full test suite passes
Config JSON validates
Update offices/pm/backlog/B-033.md US-141 acceptance criteria checkboxes
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-04-12. Performance profile rpmRedline updated 7200→7000 in obd_config.json:124. Only 1 source location needed updating (no other 7200 occurrences in src/). No test changes needed (no tests referenced rpmRedline=7200). 1517 tests pass, config validates.

userStories.title: Correct Stock Turbo Boost Pressure Limits
userStories.description: Legacy profile has boostPressureMax=18 psi, but the CIO's stock TD04-13G turbo safely caps at 14-15 psi. 18 psi is compressor surge territory, above turbo efficiency range. Correct value for stock turbo is 15 psi.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/obd_config.json:121: boostPressureMax from 18 to 15
Update src/alert/thresholds.py:140: matching default from 18 to 15
Add code comment near both values: 'Stock TD04-13G turbo safe ceiling. Update when turbo is upgraded (16G/20G).'
Update any tests asserting the old 18 psi value
Full test suite passes
Update offices/pm/backlog/B-033.md US-142 acceptance criteria checkboxes
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-04-12. Performance profile boostPressureMax updated 18→15 in obd_config.json:127. Default in thresholds.py:140 updated 18→15 with stock turbo comment. No test changes needed (test fixtures use independent fixture values). 1517 tests pass, config validates.

userStories.title: Fix Phase 2 Display Stub Defaults
userStories.description: Phase 2 display stubs in boost_detail.py and fuel_detail.py have ballpark-wrong defaults: BOOST_CAUTION=18.0 (too high, should be 14.0), BOOST_DANGER=22.0 (head gasket failure territory, should be 15.0), INJECTOR_CAUTION=80.0 (should be 75% per Spool's IDC spec). A developer implementing Phase 2 would see these stubs and assume they're reasonable values. They're not.
acceptanceCriteria: src/display/screens/boost_detail.py: BOOST_CAUTION_DEFAULT from 18.0 to 14.0
src/display/screens/boost_detail.py: BOOST_DANGER_DEFAULT from 22.0 to 15.0
src/display/screens/fuel_detail.py: INJECTOR_CAUTION_DEFAULT from 80.0 to 75.0
INJECTOR_DANGER_DEFAULT on line 39 is already correct (85.0) — do NOT change
Add comment at both boost constants: 'Stock TD04-13G turbo values. Will be finalized in B-029 Phase 2.'
Update tests/test_boost_detail.py assertions for new defaults
Update tests/test_fuel_detail.py assertions for new injector caution default
Full test suite passes
Update offices/pm/backlog/B-033.md US-143 acceptance criteria checkboxes
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-04-12. BOOST_CAUTION_DEFAULT 18.0→14.0, BOOST_DANGER_DEFAULT 22.0→15.0, INJECTOR_CAUTION_DEFAULT 80.0→75.0. INJECTOR_DANGER_DEFAULT 85.0 confirmed correct, not changed. Added stock TD04-13G turbo comment to boost constants. Fixed docstring turbo reference (TD05H→TD04-13G). All 88 display tests pass. 1517 full suite pass.

userStories.title: Clean Up Profile Manager Docstring Example
userStories.description: src/obd/profile_manager.py:47 module docstring has alertThresholds={'rpmRedline': 7500} as an example. 7500 is the 95-96 2G DSM redline — wrong vehicle year for the CIO's 1998 Eclipse GST (97-99 2G, redline 7000). Zero runtime impact but documentation hygiene matters.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/obd/profile_manager.py:47 docstring example: rpmRedline from 7500 to 7000
OR use a generic placeholder (e.g., 7000) with a comment: 'redline is vehicle-specific'
No runtime impact — documentation only
Full test suite still passes (no test changes expected)
Update offices/pm/backlog/B-033.md US-144 acceptance criteria checkboxes
userStories.notes: Reference: Variance 7 in Spool's audit. Documentation hygiene. Exact class of error (wrong vehicle year) that US-139 fixed in runtime code.
